evidence.snippet: Originally founded in 1991 as an advanced research and development company, Sensors Unlimited, Inc. quickly grew to become a major supplier of InGaAs technology, products, and shortwave IR imaging solutions.

--------------------------
Sensors Unlimited offers a complete line of products for image sensing in the short wave infrared (SWIR) portion of the light spectrum, producing arrays and cameras that enable users to "see beyond" what the naked eye can detect.

items.notes: SWIR InGaAs cameras and focal plane arrays explicitly marketed for ISR, night vision, covert surveillance, and unmanned vehicle payloads.

products_categories.notes: All products are SWIR/InGaAs imaging sensors and cameras. Company page explicitly mentions 'ground and air unmanned vehicle (UV) payloads' as a current deployment.

evidence.snippet:
Sensors Unlimited, Inc.
330 Carter Road, Suite 100
Princeton, NJ 08540

--------------------------
Sensors Unlimited offers a complete line of products for image sensing in the short wave infrared (SWIR) portion of the light spectrum, producing arrays and cameras that enable users to "see beyond" what the naked eye can detect.

Originally founded in 1991 as an advanced research and development company, Sensors Unlimited, Inc. quickly grew to become a major supplier of InGaAs technology, products, and shortwave IR imaging solutions.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells SWIR InGaAs camera modules and focal plane arrays that OEMs integrate into drone ISR payloads, gimbal assemblies, and other platforms. Now a Raytheon (RTX) business unit.

evidence.snippet:
1280JSX HD Camera
The compact Sensors Unlimited 1280JSX is our next-generation SWIR digital video camera featuring a 1.3MP high-resolution, high-sensitivity InGaAs imager.

640CSX VGA Camera
The compact Sensors Unlimited Micro-SWIR™ 640CSX is the next-generation SWIR video camera, designed for applications requiring small size, weight and power (SWaP), and available without ITAR restrictions.

items.name: 640CSX+MMT ALPD Camera
items.product_type: 2D SWIR camera core with ALPD and multi-mode tracking

items.name: SPS+MMT
items.product_type: SWIR Pocket Scope with Multi Mode Tracker

products.notes: Additional products coming soon: 1280JSX+MMT, 1280JSX HD 10µm, eSWIR 640CSX+MMT, 640HSX2, 640CSXCC+MMT.

ndaa.notes: Site claims 'non-ITAR' for the 320CSX but makes no explicit NDAA Sec 848/889 compliance claim. Company is a Raytheon (RTX) subsidiary and part of the Trusted Foundry Program.

evidence.snippet: Sensors Unlimited is now accepting RFQs for a minimum-order-quantity (MOQ) of 10 units for the products listed below.

readiness.notes: Core product lines in production; newer variants accepting RFQs with stated MOQ, indicating production ramp for those SKUs.

unresolved_questions: NDAA 848/889 explicit compliance not disclosed on site

fetch_requests.reason: Would confirm explicit drone/UAV ISR payload role and yield additional citations for products_categories and drone_supply_chain_role
640CSX+MMT product detail page would confirm drone/UAS payload use case and production readiness for this key ISR camera core

tagline: RTX-owned InGaAs SWIR camera and linescan sensor manufacturer with production 2D systems (1280JSX, 640CSX, 320CSX) and 1D linescan products. Several next-generation variants (extended-SWIR, integrated tracking, color-fusion) in low-rate production. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence on defense program integration is limited.
